title: Summary of 'not done' on mirror status columns.

posts.author: Debbie9991 (Debbie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I would really like the option to show a summary of ‘not done’ statuses on mirrored columns in addition to the ‘all labels’ and ‘what’s done’ options we currently have.

I wrote about this in more depth in a reply to another post asking for the same thing, however, I noticed that post was in board discussions so I thought it would be good to start a post in feature requests. I’ve linked the original post below.

Original post in board discusssions
